rulings.Case Title: LOUISE DOUGLAS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 15, 2016, Line 1: RESPONDENTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and THE SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD'S DEMURRER TO PETITIONERS' FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. Continued to August 4, 2016 on Court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ART WALKER VS. CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY, A BUSINESS ENTITY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 15, 2016, Line 2: DEFENDANT CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED, multiple issues of triable fact, including facts 2 and 3. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ESTRELLA REYES DE JESUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Pltf'S Req. For Production Of Documents, Set No 1 And Imposing Monetary Sanctions (Antonio Munoz)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 15, 2016, Line 5: PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. 1 And Imposing Monetary Sanctions (Antonio Munoz). Granted, subject to opposition. Responses without objections must be served within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $490. =(501/REQ)
